claude-md.title: CLAUDE.md
claude-md.description: Your project's persistent memory — jurisdiction defaults, citation standards, and confidentiality rules.

settings.title: Settings & Permissions
settings.description: Configure tool access, filesystem scope, and safety guardrails for client data protection.

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Contextual conventions for contracts and memos that load automatically based on the files you're editing.

commands.title: Custom Slash Commands
commands.description: Saved legal workflows — contract review and memo drafting — invoked with a keystroke.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Teach Claude jurisdiction-specific knowledge it loads autonomously for NY law matters.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.description: Connect Claude to your matter database, filesystem, and research tools via standard protocol.

hooks.title: Hooks
hooks.description: Automated guards — block PII in outputs and validate Bluebook citations before they ship.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Three-agent contract review pipeline: reviewer, researcher, and memo drafter working in sequence.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Package jurisdiction skills, review agents, and confidentiality hooks into a shareable legal ops toolkit.

bundled-skills.title: Bundled Skills
bundled-skills.description: Built-in Claude Code skills applied to legal workflows — batch clause updates, project setup, and more.

built-in-commands.title: Built-in Commands
built-in-commands.description: Slash commands baked into Claude Code — session management, diagnostics, and matter isolation.

children.name: settings.json
children.label: Settings & Permissions
children.description: Filesystem scope, blocked tools, and approved MCP servers for client data protection.

children.name: what-are-rules.md
children.label: What Are Rules?
children.description: How contextual conventions work — rules load automatically based on the files you're editing.

children.name: contracts.md
children.label: Contract Review Conventions
children.description: Defined terms verification, standard clause checklist, and red flags to catch in every contract.

children.name: memos.md
children.label: Legal Memo Conventions
children.description: IRAC format, Bluebook citations, jurisdiction checks, and conflict flagging.

children.name: what-are-commands.md
children.label: What Are Commands?
children.description: Saved prompt templates invoked with a slash — turn complex workflows into a single keystroke.

children.name: review-contract.md
children.label: /review-contract
children.description: Structured contract analysis with parties, key terms, risk flags, missing clauses, and negotiation recommendations.

children.name: draft-memo.md
children.label: /draft-memo
children.description: Generate an IRAC legal research memorandum with Bluebook citations and jurisdiction defaults.

children.name: what-are-skills.md
children.label: What Are Skills?
children.description: Specialized knowledge Claude loads autonomously — jurisdiction rules, citation formats, case law references.

children.name: SKILL.md
children.label: NY Jurisdiction Skill
children.description: Statutes of limitation, Statute of Frauds, BCL formation, UCC Article 2, and NY citation format.

children.name: verify-citations.sh
children.label: Citation Verifier Script
children.description: Shell script that checks Bluebook citation format — catches missing reporters, incorrect abbreviations.

children.name: case-law-reference.md
children.label: Key NY Cases
children.description: Quick reference of frequently cited NY cases — Palsgraf, Wood v. Lucy, Jacob & Youngs, and more.

children.name: memo-template.md
children.label: IRAC Memo Template
children.description: Fillable IRAC memorandum template with NY-specific sections and privilege markings.

children.name: what-are-hooks.md
children.label: What Are Hooks?
children.description: Automated guardrails — shell scripts that enforce confidentiality and citation standards on every file write.

children.name: confidentiality-guard.sh
children.label: Confidentiality Guard
children.description: PreToolUse hook that blocks writes containing SSN patterns, privilege markers, or client names.

children.name: citation-validator.sh
children.label: Citation Validator
children.description: PostToolUse hook that checks Bluebook format — case name italics, section symbols, year parentheticals.

children.name: what-are-agents.md
children.label: What Are Agents?
children.description: Specialized sub-agents that work in sequence — reviewer, researcher, memo drafter — like delegating to associates.

children.name: contract-reviewer.md
children.label: Contract Reviewer Agent
children.description: Extracts defined terms, risk-rates provisions, flags missing clauses, and outputs structured JSON.

children.name: research-assistant.md
children.label: Research Assistant Agent
children.description: Verifies legal claims, finds supporting and contrary authority, flags unsettled areas of law.

children.name: memo-drafter.md
children.label: Memo Drafter Agent
children.description: Synthesizes contract review and research into a client-ready IRAC memorandum.

children.name: what-are-plugins.md
children.label: What Are Plugins?
children.description: Package skills, agents, hooks, and commands into a single shareable extension for your entire firm.

children.name: plugin.json
children.label: Legal Ops Toolkit Plugin
children.description: Bundles jurisdiction skills, contract review agents, and confidentiality hooks into one shareable package.

tree.name: .mcp.json
tree.label: MCP Configuration
tree.description: Connects Claude to filesystem (scoped to /matters/), matter database, and web search for case law research.

tree.name: CLAUDE.md
tree.label: Project Memory
tree.description: Jurisdiction defaults (NY), Bluebook citations, confidentiality rules, and firm conventions that persist across sessions.

children.name: README.md
children.label: Source Code
children.description: The project's application code — contract parsing, research automation, and document templates.

children.name: skills-overview.md
children.label: Bundled Skills for Legal
children.description: Built-in skills applied to legal workflows — /batch for clause updates, /init for matter setup, /compact for long reviews.

children.name: commands-overview.md
children.label: Built-in Commands for Legal
children.description: Session management, diagnostics, and matter isolation commands with legal context.
